title: heliophila pusilla
intro: Heliophila pusilla, also known as the dwarf crithm or crithmum, is a small, perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Heliophila pusilla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. Heliophila pusilla can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tincture, or salve, allowing for various forms of medicinal application.
